scripts.build: tsup src/background.ts src/content.ts src/page-hook.ts src/sidepanel.ts --format iife --target es2020 --splitting false --clean --out-dir dist && node scripts/copy-assets.mjs
scripts.dev: tsup src/background.ts src/content.ts src/page-hook.ts src/sidepanel.ts --format iife --target es2020 --splitting false --watch --out-dir dist --onSuccess "node scripts/copy-assets.mjs"
